prompt: Epic action macro photograph on a forest twig. A tiny armored warrior with the uploaded face as reference rides a large realistic black ant like a warhorse. The rider wears detailed fantasy armor, posed dynamically as if charging into battle, holding reins made from spider silk wrapped around the ant’s head. The ant’s exoskeleton is ultra-shiny, highly detailed, and textured, with sharp legs gripping the twig. Cinematic macro lighting, shallow depth of field. Background is a soft green leafy bokeh with natural forest tones. Hyper-realistic insect photography style, ultra detail, crisp focus on the ant and rider, dramatic action mood.
